creator: stephen@missouri.edu
text:
Yuri,

I'll be happy to commit your ports.  But do you know what arved meant 
about a newer version being available?  I looked around, and I couldn't 
find any fedora 10 version of ibus-libs more recent than 1.1.0.20090829.

If you cannot find anything more recent, or if you update the patch, I 
will go ahead and commit it.
